title: EQ - Change propagation, use two mobile phones
scenario: EQ settings (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom) applied on one phone are not reflected on the second phone when the same Poly device is paired to both phones simultaneously via the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Phone A and ensure the Poly device is connected.
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Select an EQ preset (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom) and apply it.
On Phone B, open Poly Studio Mobile app and pair/connect to the same Poly device (device should already be paired to both phones).
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer on Phone B.
Observe the currently selected EQ preset on Phone B.
expected: The EQ preset selected on Phone A (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom) is reflected and shown as active on Phone B's Equalizer screen.
